t_ch: 「那是世人所知的最后一战，由两名不善争斗的半神发起。」
t_en: "It was the last battle known to the world, initiated by two demigods least suited for war."

t_ch: 「而后，『理性』和『诡计』兑现了承诺。他们以生命为代价，将来古士封印于创世涡心，直至今日。」
t_en: "In the end, Reason and Trickery kept their word. At the cost of their lives, they sealed Lygus within the Vortex of Genesis, where he remains to this day."

t_ch: 「奥赫玛将永远屹立」…赛飞儿小姐的谎言，终究还是破灭了呀。
t_en: "Okhema will stand eternal." Miss Cipher's lie has crumbled after all...

t_ch: 但没关系。至此，我们所有人都完成了使命……
t_en: But it's alright. Because all of us have fulfilled our purpose by now...

t_ch: 等到「救世主」归来的那一天。无论{M#他}{F#她}身在何方，「天空」都会放晴，架起彩虹的桥梁，护送{M#他}{F#她}去往最后的战场。
t_en: When the Deliverer returns, no matter where {F#s}he is, Sky will turn clear and a rainbow bridge will rise, carrying {M#him}{F#her} to the final battleground.

t_ch: 涟宝，漫长的接力终于来到了尾声，命运的最后一棒，就交给你啦？
t_en: Cyrie, this arduous relay is finally nearing its end. Now I'm passing the final baton of fate to you, okay?

t_ch: …不对，这么说似乎有些奇怪。
t_en: ...No, that's not quite right.

t_ch: 毕竟，这段旅途最初的星星之火，就是你和{NICKNAME}带来的呀。
t_en: After all, it was you and {NICKNAME} who lit the first spark of this journey, wasn't it?

t_ch: 我会把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。这样一来，它们就不再是我一个人的回忆。
t_en: I'll tell you the story of this thousand-year journey. That way, it won't just be my memories alone.

t_ch: 同样地，我会把和{NICKNAME}一同经历的时光讲给每个人听。这样一来，我们走过的路就会成为所有人的记忆。
t_en: And I'll share the moments I spent with {NICKNAME} with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.

t_ch: 人们会知道，不必再去追逐什么，翁法罗斯早已迎来神谕中的{RUBY_B#天外的救世主}黎明{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: People will know that there's nothing left to chase. Amphoreus has already welcomed the {RUBY_B#Deliverer beyond the sky}dawn{RUBY_E#} foretold in prophecy.

t_ch: 就像人家说的一样，不会比上一次更难，对吧？
t_en: Just like I said, this should be easier than last time, right?

t_ch: 谢谢。你们付出了太多。
t_en: Thank you. You've all sacrificed so much.

t_ch: 抱歉，我来迟了…
t_en: Sorry I'm late...

t_ch: 我绝不会辜负大家的信念。
t_en: I won't let everyone's faith in me go to waste.

t_ch: 此时此刻，{NICKNAME}会露出怎样的表情呢？肯定和以前一样，从容、坚定，充满自信吧？
t_en: I wonder what kind of expression is {NICKNAME} is wearing right now? Probably the same as always: calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.

t_ch: 如果有机会，人家也想再看一次呢。
t_en: If I have the chance... I'd love to see it again.

t_ch: 因为距离我们分别，真的…过去太久啦。
t_en: Because... it's really been far too long since we parted.

t_ch: 昔涟，连你也…
t_en: Cyrene... even you...

t_ch: 这一切…都是记忆吗？
t_en: Is this... all a memory?

t_ch: 聪明如{NICKNAME}，走到这里，一定已经发现了吧？——这里不是现实，而是一道「岁月」的迷宫。
t_en: Someone as sharp as {NICKNAME} must've realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of Time.

t_ch: 接力的最后一环，由我回到命运三相殿，为欧洛尼斯讲述这些故事，把大家写下的每一页，都装进「记忆」的小瓶子里……
t_en: As the last link in the relay, I will return to the Temple of the Three Fates, tell Oronyx all of our stories, and bottle every page we've written into the little flask of "memories"...

t_ch: 然后，愿它能安然启航…与「负世」的火种一同飘过时间的长河，飘到{NICKNAME}身边，成为你回到翁法罗斯的指引。
t_en: And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach {NICKNAME}'s side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 就像我们的初遇，对不对？
t_en: Just like the first time we met, right?

t_ch: 虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
t_en: Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.

t_ch: 只有通过这种方式，我们才能确保在{NICKNAME}归来前，「再创世」一定不会发生……
t_en: This is the only way to make sure that the "Era Nova" won't happen before {NICKNAME} returns...

t_ch: 也只有这样，人家才能把最后一次逐火之旅，完完整整地放进「救世主」心里。
t_en: And the only way I can safely entrust the completed final Flame-Chase Journey to the Deliverer's heart.

t_ch: 毕竟，新世界会从你的「记忆」中诞生。故事的主角…可千万不能缺席呀。
t_en: After all, the new world will be born from your "memories," and the protagonist of this story... mustn't be absent.

t_ch: 按照约定，我回来了。
t_en: As promised, I'm back.

t_ch: 走吧，该去完成「再创世」了。
t_en: Let's go. It's time to complete the "Era Nova."

t_ch: 我会将你们所有人带往新世界。
t_en: I will take all of you to the new world.

t_ch: 我相信，{NICKNAME}一定不会让人失望…一如既往。
t_en: I believe {NICKNAME} will never let us down... just like always.

t_ch: 还记得吗，白厄将我们送回起点的时候，我和{NICKNAME}也经历过离别。但最后，人家还是带着全部的过往和你重逢了。
t_en: Do you remember when Phainon sent us back to the beginning? When {NICKNAME} and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.

t_ch: 「记忆」就是这样的。在时间的长河里，它可能会磨损，会消散，但它不会离开。当内心的小角落被唤醒，回忆一定会以更美的形式再度浮现。
t_en: That's what "memory" is. It may wear down and fade in the river of time... But it never truly leaves. When that hidden corner of the heart is stirred, the past returns even more beautiful than before.

t_ch: 所以，不要担心。让「第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次逐火之旅」也成为{NICKNAME}的一部分吧。有了上一次的经验，人家也熟练许多啦。
t_en: So don't worry. Let the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey become part of {NICKNAME}, too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.

t_ch: 接下来，{NICKNAME}就要前往斯缇科西亚，找到由「海洋」半神守卫的涡心入口，然后奔向决战的舞台啦。
t_en: Next, {NICKNAME} will head to Styxia and find the Vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of Ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.

t_ch: 别担心，人家会与你同在。我们所有人，连同白厄一起…都会和「救世主」同在。
t_en: Don't worry. I'll be with you. All of us will. Even Phainon. We'll stand with the "Deliverer."

t_ch: 做个短暂的道别，然后就出发吧，像我们启程时约定的那样……
t_en: So say a short goodbye, then set off, just like we promised at the start...

t_ch: 扔下多余的烦恼，把笑容和决心一起打包，带向明天♪
t_en: ...Toss away all unnecessary worries and troubles, and bring our smiles and determination into tomorrow ♪

t_ch: （昔涟…听不见我说话吗？）
t_en: (Cyrene... can't hear me?)

t_ch: 看，往日的风景…浮现了。
t_en: Look, the scenery of the past... has resurfaced.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，来，这边……
t_en: Come, {NICKNAME}... This way.

t_ch: 「永恒圣城」…其永恒何以企及诗篇所述？
t_en: The "Eternal Holy City"... What part of that eternity ever lived up to its descriptions in poetry?

t_ch: 前进吧，救世主。
t_en: Go forth, Deliverer.

t_ch: 前进吧。冰消雪释时，花会盛开，你会找到我。
t_en: Go. When the frost melts and the snows give way, the flowers will bloom again. You'll find me there.

t_ch: 照你的意思，蜗居公主…是再也回不来了么？
t_en: So what you're saying is... Princess Homebody... is never coming back, is she?

t_ch: 前进吧——然后，明天见！
t_en: Go on... and see you tomorrow!

t_ch: 如果将我斫裂，就能让这世界多活一秒——那就这么做。
t_en: If breaking me apart buys this world even one more second... Then so be it.

t_ch: 前进吧，以我血为你铸就前路。
t_en: Keep moving forward. My blood will pave the road ahead for you.

t_ch: 前进吧，小小灰——我们明天见！
t_en: Keep moving forward. Little Gray, see you tomorrow!

t_ch: 一个谎言要用更多谎言维系，裁缝女这话果然不假哪……
t_en: That seamstress wasn't wrong when she said a lie needs more lies to keep it together...

t_ch: 前进吧，完成那未竟的大功业。
t_en: Go forth. Finish the greatness left undone.

t_ch: 别想那么多啦！前进吧，只要跑起来就足够！
t_en: Quit overthinking! Just run. Keep running, and that'll be enough!

t_ch: 涟宝，这里一片死寂……
t_en: Cyrie... It's dead quiet here...

t_ch: 最后一棒…不知道你要等多久，才能交到{NICKNAME}手中呢？
t_en: The last baton... I wonder how long you'll have to wait before passing it on to {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 多久都没有关系哦？毕竟，等待是人家最擅长的事情嘛。
t_en: No matter how long it takes, it's okay. Waiting is what I do best.

t_ch: 历经三千万世，{NICKNAME}才降临在我们身边…那，再多等片刻，又有何妨呢？
t_en: After all, it took <unbreak>33</unbreak> million cycles for {NICKNAME} to arrive in our world... What's a few moments more?

t_ch: 小家伙，看得到吗？别急着说话，这是一段预录制影像。
t_en: Hey kiddo, can you see me? Don't bother responding, this is a pre-recorded video message.

t_ch: 多亏那小皇冠开放了终极协议的权限，你不在的时候，我和螺丝对「再创世」的进程进行了…改写。
t_en: Thanks to that little empress granting access to the Ultimate Protocol, Screwy and I... rewrote the progress of "Era Nova" while you were away.

t_ch: 我猜你现在没多少时间听那些难懂的原理，那就归结成几句任谁都能听懂的人话吧——
t_en: My guess is you don't have much time to listen to all those complicated principles right now, so let me break it down into simple terms that anyone can understand...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯在「毁灭」的命途上狂飙了太久，「再创世」的底层逻辑已经彻底被污染了。我和螺丝花了很多力气，也只能勉强覆写其中的一小段逻辑……
t_en: Amphoreus has been racing down the Path of Destruction for too long, and the underlying logic of "Era Nova" has been completely corrupted. Screwy and I put in a lot of effort, but we could barely manage to overwrite a small portion of its logic...

t_ch: 还是拿进度条举例吧。铁墓现在的进度条处在<unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>的位置，通过这次被改写的「再创世」，我们有信心能让它回退到<unbreak>96%</unbreak>…咳，保守点，<unbreak>97%</unbreak>吧。
t_en: Let's take the progress bar as an example. Irontomb's progress bar is currently at <unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>, and through this rewritten "Era Nova," we're confident we can push it back to <unbreak>96%</unbreak>... Hmm, let's be conservative, say <unbreak>97%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 事关重大，权杖的内部结构太不稳定，我们也不知道会不会突发什么岔子。最理智的做法，就是抓紧时间重置一次演算，给银河再多争取些时间。
t_en: This is a critical matter. The internal structure of the Scepter is too unstable, and we don't know what complications might suddenly arise. The most rational course of action is to quickly run another extrapolation to buy the cosmos a bit more time.

t_ch: 等你把那智械哥的麻烦解决了，别犹豫，立刻开启新一轮的演算吧。螺丝说了，「再创世」才不是瞬间完成的进程，权杖受到保护的节点恐怕只有在重启的时分才最脆弱——
t_en: Once you've dealt with that troubling old Intellitron, don't hesitate and start the next cycle of extrapolation right away. Screwy said that "Era Nova" isn't a process that happens in an instant, and the protected nodes of the Scepter are probably at their most vulnerable only during the reset—

t_ch: ——只有先开启这个进程，我们才有机会借机施展拳脚。靠你了，「救世主」。
t_en: Only by initiating this progress first can we seize the opportunity to make our move. It's all up to you now, "Deliverer."

t_ch: （这是…斯缇科西亚？怎么变成了这样……）
t_en: (Is this... Styxia? What happened to this place...?)

t_ch: （我要找到「海洋」半神守护的涡心入口…海瑟音，她还在这里吗？）
t_en: (I need to find the entrance to the Vortex guarded by the demigod of Ocean. Hysilens... is she still there?)

t_ch: ——别来无恙，开拓者阁下。
t_en: Long time no see, Trailblazer.

t_ch: 一代又一代黄金裔英雄或甘愿四分五裂，或在孤寂中独守，披肝沥胆，妄图征服命运……
t_en: Generation after generation of Chrysos Heir heroes have tried to defy fate with their blood and tears, either voluntarily shattering their souls or waiting in eternal solitude...

t_ch: 但很遗憾，命运不会落败。
t_en: But alas, fate can never be defeated.

t_ch: 怎么又是你？！
t_en: You again!?

t_ch: 你…挣脱牢笼了吗？
t_en: You... managed to break free?

t_ch: 「理性」与「诡计」囚禁了我的身躯，但我的意志并不会因此沉寂。
t_en: Reason and Trickery may bind my flesh, but my will shall never fall silent.

t_ch: 于是，「海洋」的半神，剑旗爵海瑟音，妄图用歌声令我陷入幻境，试图让一位天才沉沦……
t_en: So, the demigod of Ocean, the Dux Gladiorum, Hysilens, sought to bring me into a fantasia with her voice and drown a genius in slumber...

t_ch: 可惜，这只是痴心妄想。这位典狱官先因时光的磨损陷入了迷醉，而她的囚徒安然如故。
t_en: But alas, it was all a hopeless dream. That warden fell before I did due to erosion of time, while her prisoner remained unchanged.

t_ch: 但现在，你仍被困在此处。
t_en: And yet, here you are, bound to this place.

t_ch: 可是，你还没有得到自由。
t_en: But you have yet to taste freedom.

t_ch: 呵呵，我无法离开这里，但那又如何？
t_en: Heh, true. I can't leave this place, but what of it?

t_ch: 你应该听过这样一则寓言——「在一座幽暗的洞穴中，有一群人：他们自出生起便被缚住双腿和脖颈，无法环顾、互望，或是看到自己。」
t_en: You should have heard of this fable. "In a shadowed cave lived a people, imprisoned from childhood and chained so that their legs and necks are fixed, forcing them not to look around at the cave, each other, or themselves."

t_ch: 「在他们身后是一团火，面前则是洞穴的岩壁。火光为他们留下投影，而岩壁向他们投射回声……」
t_en: "Behind them is a fire, and before them loomed the stone wall of the cave. The flames cast shadows, while the rocky surface threw back echoes..."

t_ch: 「这在我们看来虚假的一切，就是他们世界的全部。」
t_en: "To them, that false play is the whole world."

t_ch: 我被困在了洞穴之中，但我知晓这一切只是须臾幻梦。我不必在梦中挣扎，只需等待。
t_en: Yes, I'm trapped in the cave, but I know it's all just a fleeting illusion. I don't struggle in dreams. I wait.

t_ch: 现在，我等到了我的解脱者——若想彻底战胜我，拯救这个本与你无关的世界，就必须唤醒此处的歌者，打开名为创世涡心的囚笼……
t_en: And now, my deliverer has come. To defeat me and save this world that never owed you anything, you'll need to awaken the singer here and unseal the prison called Vortex of Genesis...

t_ch: 你将亲手解开我的镣铐，促成洞穴的坍塌。
t_en: You'll be the one to unshackle me and bring the cave crashing down.

t_ch: 当然，我也不介意再多等片刻，带你穿过前方的迷梦——来自那位典狱长的追忆。
t_en: Of course, I don't mind waiting a little longer. Let me guide you through this next illusion, one last memory from that prison warden.

t_ch: 希望你能静静观赏幻境中的故事。于理，「救世主」有义务将此世的全貌尽收眼底；于情，眼前这出回忆正是翁法罗斯所有人命运最好的写照……
t_en: I hope you'll watch the stories of this fantasia closely. Logically, the Deliverer must see the world for what it truly is. Emotionally, this memory captures the fate of everyone in Amphoreus better than anything else...

t_ch: 只有对其感同身受，你才能理解我的观点：
t_en: Only by feeling it for yourself can you understand my point of view:

t_ch: 「毁灭」的意义。
t_en: The meaning of "Destruction."

t_ch: 而我会亲自毁灭你的野心。
t_en: And I'll be the one to bring destruction to your scheme.

t_ch: 收起这套陈词滥调吧。
t_en: Spare me the clichés.

t_ch: 我不需要理解你。
t_en: I don't need to understand you.

t_ch: 向您澎湃的决心致敬。那么，在踏上最后的舞台前，请允许我基于先前的寓言向你发问——
t_en: To your unshakable resolve, I salute you. But before we step onto the final stage, let me ask you this, in the spirit of that fable I told you just now...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「洞穴中的囚徒是否能够识别投影和回声，而非将其错认为真正的世界？」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Can the prisoners in the cave learn to see the shadows and echoes for what they are, and stop mistaking them for reality?"</color>

t_ch: 漆黑的浪潮在海中漫溢，我们的王国危在旦夕……
t_en: The dark tides flood the sea... And our kingdom teeters on the edge...

t_ch: 莫要焦急，我们的女王已奔赴边境，亲自将灾厄平息。
t_en: Fear not. Our queen has gone to the borderlands. She'll quell this calamity herself.

t_ch: 这一幕是「海洋」黄金裔诞生时的历史…曾经，她是名为「海妖」的泰坦眷属。
t_en: This is the scene when the Chrysos Heir of Ocean was born... She was once of a Titankin race named "sea sirens."

t_ch: 彼时，卡厄斯兰那压制了黑潮的蔓延，但无法根除铁墓的苗床。黑潮仍在世界深处涌动，正是海妖的国度最先拥抱了「毁灭」。
t_en: At that time, Khaslana had suppressed the black tide's rise, but he was unable to remove Irontomb from its roots. The black tide still roiled in the depths of the world, and the kingdom of sea sirens was the first to embrace the Destruction.

t_ch: 快听，我听到了海列屈拉的歌声，她在呼唤我们！
t_en: Listen, I heard Helektra's voice! She's calling to us!

t_ch: 我们走吧，她的歌声，等同女王的敕令。
t_en: Let's go. Her voice carries the queen's command.

t_ch: 我的姊妹！你们终于游来了。
t_en: My sisters! You're finally here.

t_ch: 当然，海列屈拉，我们被你曼妙的乐音所牵引。
t_en: Of course, Helektra. Your beautiful melody drew us here.

t_ch: 海瑟音…
t_en: Hysilens...

t_ch: 海列屈拉…？
t_en: Helektra...?

t_ch: 她的真名是「海列屈拉」——那是过去的她，在不甘中回望的残影。
t_en: Her true name is Helektra. This is a reflection of her former self, clinging to the past with aching defiance.

t_ch: 女王在召见我们。想必她已精疲力尽，黑潮终将流入边境。
t_en: The queen summons us. She must be near exhaustion... The black tide will soon enter our borders.

t_ch: 那该如何是好？我们的海域，难道也要沦为漆黑的惨景？
t_en: Then what do we do? Will our seas fall to darkness and terror as well?

t_ch: 不必担心。我们会代她捧起承接黑潮的杯，一同护国佑民。
t_en: Don't worry. We shall lift the chalice in her stead to catch the black tide, and stand together to safeguard our realm and its people.

t_ch: 渺小的泰坦眷属，以为自己能阻挡真理的浪潮，多么天真……
t_en: Such tiny Titankins... thinking they can stop the tide of truth. How naive...

t_ch: 这份天真，就是苦难的因。
t_en: And that naivety... is the root of all suffering.

t_ch: 哦，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}，高贵的女王！我们已响应您的召唤而来。
t_en: Oh, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, our noble queen! We've come at your call!

t_ch: 我的小鱼们，你们游动的身姿多么欢欣，让我不忍宣读王国的不幸……
t_en: My little fishlings... you swim with such joy. It pains me to speak of the kingdom's sorrow...

t_ch: 我曾以为，我能将黑潮一饮而尽。但再深邃的酒杯也终会满溢，我已无法容纳更多泥泞。
t_en: I once believed I could drink the black tide dry, but even the deepest chalice must one day overflow... and I can hold no more of this filth.

t_ch: 我的母亲，不必忧心。我们都是海洋的孩子，会为您分担宿命。
t_en: Mother, worry not. We're all children of the sea. Let us bear your fate together.

t_ch: 我们会接过您的职责，驱散黑色的潮水。
t_en: We'll take up your mantle and drive back the black currents.

t_ch: 我们会修好您的圣杯，接下诅咒的污秽。
t_en: We'll mend your sacred chalice and take in the cursed filth.

t_ch: 鱼儿们！待到「纷争」的长矛降临，你们便可隐退。
t_en: My little fishlings! When the spear of Strife falls, you may retreat in peace.

t_ch: 我向你们允诺，地上的城邦会为你们举办一场无休的宴会……
t_en: I promise you: On the surface, the city-states will hold a feast without end in your honor...

t_ch: 这便是，我能给予你们最后的恩惠。
t_en: This is the last gift I can give you.

t_ch: 法吉娜在深渊中沉沦，杯身破碎——她的醉意注入黑潮，为翁法罗斯带来了最初的疯狂。
t_en: Phagousa sank into the abyss, with the chalice shattered, their intoxication spilled into the black tide, birthing the first madness in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 海妖们前赴后继，寻找泰坦的碎片，直至身躯腐败，化作枯骨，只为能迎来允诺中的欢宴。
t_en: Sea sirens followed one after another, hunting for the Titan's fragments... until their flesh decayed and their bones crumbled, all for the promised final feast.

t_ch: 继续观赏吧。小心：往后的舞台年久失修，一如她破碎的命运。
t_en: Keep watching. But tread carefully, for the stage ahead is crumbling with age... just like her shattered fate.

t_ch: 姐妹们，不要放弃，别忘了女王许诺的欢宴——那座名为斯缇科西亚的城邦！
t_en: Sisters, don't give up. Remember the queen's promise of a feast... in the city called Styxia!

t_ch: 我没有忘记，每一晚，它都会出现在我们的梦中……
t_en: I haven't forgotten. It visits me in dreams every night...

t_ch: 梦见城中是多么美丽，灯火穿透幽暗的海底……
t_en: I dreamed of a shining city, its lights piercing the deep gloom of the seabed...

t_ch: 梦见孩童将花环戴上我们的骨角，诗人传唱着海妖护世的功绩……
t_en: I dreamed of children placing garlands on our bone horns, and poets praising the sea sirens for shielding the world...

t_ch: 只是可惜…我们已无法前行，请你代我们给人类歌唱，歌唱深海的传奇……
t_en: But what a shame... we can go no further. Please, sing to the humans for us. Sing of the deep sea's legend, in our place...

t_ch: 宴会…歌唱…海列屈拉……
t_en: Feast... song... Helektra...

t_ch: 海妖们被「毁灭」侵蚀，血肉腐败，成为了此世的黑潮造物。
t_en: The sea sirens were tainted by the Destruction, their flesh rotted away. They became the Black Tide Creatures of this cycle.

t_ch: …再见了，姐妹。我会完成最后的使命，再来布置你们的宴席。
t_en: ...Farewell, sisters. I'll finish this last task, then return to prepare your feast.

t_ch: 于是，海床间只剩下一尾清醒的海妖。海瑟音，她在海中孤独地洄游，送葬自己的同胞，寻找满溢之杯的碎片……
t_en: And so, only one sea siren remained among the sea floor... Hysilens, swimming alone through the seas, burying her kin, and searching for the fragments of the Chalice of Plenty...

t_ch: 不过，其中大多时间皆是徒劳…何不让我们用「岁月」的神力飞跃至旅程终点？
t_en: Though most of that journey was in vain... why not let us use the power of Time to leap ahead toward the journey's end?

t_ch: 终于，满溢之杯重归完整，天谴之矛也踏出冥河，神明重拾起抵御黑潮的职责。
t_en: At last, the Chalice of Plenty is whole again. The Lance of Fury emerges from the River of Souls, and the gods reclaim their duty to hold back the black tide.

t_ch: 我摆脱了漫无止境的劳役，奔赴斯缇科西亚的典仪……
t_en: I am freed from endless toil and now walk toward the rites at Styxia...

t_ch: 我背负姊妹的愿景，化作曼妙的人形，期待着岸上有万民欢庆。
t_en: I bore my sisters' dreams upon my back, took on a graceful human form, and hoped to find a grand celebration on the shore.

t_ch: 我的尾鳍化作双腿，鳞片化作肌肤，体表的泡沫化作闪光的裙摆。
t_en: My fins became legs, my scales became skin, and the sea foam on my body became a shimmering gown.

t_ch: 可当我踏上陆地，却发现那里没有蜜酿泼洒的庆典，也没有诗人拨动竖琴——
t_en: But when I stepped onto land, there were no festivals with honey brew, nor poets plucking harps...

t_ch: ——只有沉默的死亡，在冥河里静静流淌。
t_en: ...Only silent death, drifting gently along the River of Souls.

t_ch: 当她终于遂愿，却发现斯缇科西亚重蹈前世的覆辙，已被「死亡」吞没……
t_en: When she fulfilled her wish, she only found Styxia to have already repeated the mistakes of previous cycles and was swallowed by Death...

t_ch: 期许、诺言，皆是如梦泡影。
t_en: Hopes and promises are nothing but the foam of dreams.

t_ch: 身为海妖的我，生来便是潮汐的容器。既然使命完结，承诺又无法兑现……
t_en: I am a sea siren, a vessel born to contain the tides. Now that my task is done, and the promise is broken...

t_ch: 那我…又该以何种方式，生存在漆黑的世间？
t_en: How... am I to go on? In a world drowned in shadow?

t_ch: 法吉娜，高贵的女王，她用迷醉逃避我的追问，她说，大地之上总有我渴求的欢宴……
t_en: Phagousa. My noble queen... she evaded my questions with drunken stupor. She told me a grand feast awaited me in the surface world...

t_ch: 于是，我开始漫无目的地游弋，在黑暗中摸索……
t_en: So I wandered, lost, groping through the dark...

t_ch: 在岸上徘徊许久后，迷茫的海妖邂逅了来日的共犯……
t_en: After wandering the surface for ages, the lost sea siren met her future conspirator...

t_ch: 你孤身将战事平息，令「纷争」退行。这柄号令千军的剑旗，是为何人效命？
t_en: You quelled the wars alone and forced Strife into retreat. This swordfish that commands thousands of legions... whom does she serve?

t_ch: 是刻律德菈…
t_en: It's Cerydra...

t_ch: 这是她们相遇的情景。
t_en: This was the moment they met.

t_ch: 没错。还未成为凯撒的刻律德菈，早已满怀雄心。
t_en: Yes. Cerydra, long before she became the Imperator, was already burning with ambition.

t_ch: 践行神谕的王，我并非谁人的剑旗。我只是彷徨的鱼，在杀戮中寻求清醒。
t_en: Sovereign who follows prophecy... I am no one's sword. I am just a wandering fish, seeking clarity through bloodshed.

t_ch: 那不如让剑为我而舞，让琴为我而鸣——
t_en: Then how about letting the sword dance for me, and letting the violin sing in my name...

t_ch: 说吧，你有何种愿景？
t_en: Tell me. What is it you seek?

t_ch: 我…只要一处能令我容身的宴席。
t_en: All I want... is a feast where I might belong.

t_ch: 以王的权柄，置酒设宴不值一提。我将令你在胜后尽兴，与我的将士开怀畅饮……
t_en: Such a demand is trivial with the sovereign's authority. I'll grant you a banquet worthy of conquest, and comrades to toast beside you...

t_ch: 但是，骑士，你要献上你的心。
t_en: But, knight, you must offer me your heart.

t_ch: 心？
t_en: My heart?

t_ch: 没错，一颗绝对赤诚的忠心。
t_en: Yes. A loyal heart that will generate no betrayal.

t_ch: 你受尽神的诓骗，沉溺海的黑暗。而现在，我会令你前行，成为你的光明。
t_en: You were deceived by gods and drowned in the ocean's darkness. But now, I will lead you forward and be your light.

t_ch: 无妨，尊贵的王。您宣告的「律法」，将是我生命的纲领……
t_en: So be it, noble monarch. The Law you proclaim shall govern my every breath...

t_ch: 无妨，尊贵的王。不过又一次成为他人的器物，接纳被赋予的使命。
t_en: So be it, noble monarch. I am simply becoming someone else's vessel once again, and accepting a duty given to me.

t_ch: 于是，她在空虚的漫游中终于找到了新的目标，如同天光直射深海。
t_en: And thus, in her hollow drift, she finally found a new purpose, like sunlight piercing the deepest trench.

t_ch: 尊贵的王！我已遵您指令，将征程上的污秽清洗。
t_en: Noble monarch! I've cleansed the foulness from the road, as you commanded.

t_ch: 我的锋刃，你已助我加冕登基，大可尽情讨要馈遗。
t_en: My blade, you've helped me ascend and take the crown. Ask, and you shall have your reward.

t_ch: 我之所求，一如往昔。只是一场宴席。
t_en: What I desire is the same as before. A feast.

t_ch: 哈哈——看，我已为你备好晚宴，带来了最好的蜜酿与贡品！
t_en: Haha! Look, I've prepared you a grand banquet! The finest honey brew and tributes await!

t_ch: 游鱼天性趋光，因为海渊昏暗苍茫……
t_en: Fish are drawn to light by nature, for the deep sea knows only gloom...

t_ch: 现在，我找到一团火光。即便过于灼热滚烫，却也是唯一的明亮。
t_en: Now, I've found a flame. It may scald and burn, but it's the only light.

t_ch: 让我们也加入宴会吧，前行的门扉，或许就藏在席间。
t_en: Come, let us join the feast. Perhaps the path forward lies hidden among the revelry.

t_ch: 臣子们，今日的宴会并非只是纪念旧日，更是为了庆贺未来——
t_en: My faithful subjects, tonight's feast is not just for the past. It's a toast to the future!

t_ch: 我等金血孕育出一头无往不利的{RUBY_B#铁墓}巨兽{RUBY_E#}，它将成为我们的铁蹄，踏遍天外群星！
t_en: Born from our golden blood is an unstoppable {RUBY_B#Irontomb}colossus{RUBY_E#}, our iron beast to trample the universe!

t_ch: 伟大的王，我听闻星间强敌环伺，我们是否还能百战不殆？
t_en: Great monarch, I've heard the universe teems with great threats. Can we truly remain invincible?

t_ch: 无需多虑，在「毁灭」的棋军前，宵小之徒不过是星间尘埃。
t_en: Fear not. Before the troops of the Destruction, such rabble is no more than cosmic dust.

t_ch: 寰宇中定会有遍布汪洋的星球，待我攻克那里，便将它封为你的领地！
t_en: Surely there's a planet draped in oceans out there in the stars. Once I claim it, it shall be yours to rule!

t_ch: 还有其他人，功成之后，你们亦会得到对应的奖赏。我许诺你们一个无忧的时代！
t_en: And to the rest, your triumphs will not go unrewarded. I promise you a new age, free of fear!

t_ch: 现在，为征服星海举杯吧！
t_en: Now, raise your cups! To our conquest among the sea of stars!

t_ch: 征服星海！征服星海！
t_en: Sea of stars! Sea of stars!

t_ch: 征服星海，多么伟大的愿景。但对那位海妖骑士来说，唯有欢宴值得上心……
t_en: Conquest among the sea of stars... What a grand vision. Yet, to the siren knight, only feasts still stir her heart...

t_ch: 敬请上前，与我一同见证，这虚妄幻境的终幕吧。
t_en: Come now. Join me. Witness the end of this futile dream.

t_ch: 高贵的骑士，你是一颗滚烫的火星，能与你共飨盛宴，可谓是我的荣幸。
t_en: Noble knight, you are truly a blazing spark. It's my honor to share this banquet with you.

t_ch: 高贵的骑士，你用剑刃换来了胜利，理应享受此刻的意兴，让我为你斟满蜜酿。
t_en: Noble knight, you have earned victory with your blade, and you have every reason to revel in this moment of triumph. Let me pour you a glass of honey brew.

t_ch: 高贵的骑士，王已端坐王座之上，这荣耀同样是你的功勋，让我向你举杯致敬。
t_en: Noble knight, with the sovereign now enthroned, this triumph is yours as much as hers. Let me raise a toast to you.

t_ch: 高贵的骑士，你的力量无穷无尽，一定要带我们征服天际，让我与你碰杯为誓！
t_en: Noble knight, your strength is boundless! Lead us to conquer the universe, and let us toast to that vow!

t_ch: …那就来吧，让我们举杯共饮。
t_en: ...Then drink we shall. Raise your glass.

t_ch: 在那深海，我从不知晓「火」的存在。而当我踏上岸，第一次瞥见的光…便是金血点燃的战火。
t_en: In the deep sea, I never knew what "fire" was. But when I set foot on land, the first light that I saw was the flames of war lit with golden blood.

t_ch: 那火灼伤了我的鳍，令我感受到痛楚，还有……
t_en: It scorched my fins, made me feel pain, and...

t_ch: 无比炽热的渴望。
t_en: Ignited an unprecedented hunger.

t_ch: 这种渴望在每个英雄体内摇曳，耀眼…却又灼目。
t_en: A hunger that flickers in every hero's heart, so bright, yet so blinding...

t_ch: 「她的一只眼睛看见光荣，另一只眼睛看见尸身。」
t_en: "One eye of hers sees glory. The other sees corpses."

t_ch: 「而她喜爱光荣的名字，甚于恐惧与死亡——」
t_en: "And yet, she cherishes the name of glory more than fear and death..."

t_ch: 「啊！正所谓，懦夫在未死之前，便死了千万次。」
t_en: "Ah, as they say: the coward died a thousand times before his end."

t_ch: 「而勇士一生只死一回——这自有神明为她作证。」
t_en: "But the brave face death but once, which gods stand witness."

t_ch: 在出征的前日，我们高唱颂歌，准备向星海启航……
t_en: On the eve of war, we sang our hymns, and set our sights to sail beyond the stars...

t_ch: 军团乘上那头巨兽，如洋流般漂向宇宙各地。
t_en: The legions will climb aboard the beast, riding it like currents across the cosmos.

t_ch: 一颗颗星球插上了王冠的旗帜，一片片疆域被战火点燃。
t_en: Planets after planets flew the flags of her crown. Realm after realm was ignited by her flames of war.

t_ch: 随着最后的反抗归于沉寂，一个庞大的帝国自群星间崛起——这片小小的池塘，也终于迎来了繁荣与和平。
t_en: As the final resistance fell silent, a vast empire rose from among the stars and this small pond at last embraced prosperity and peace.

t_ch: 这便是故事的结局，步入剧中的观赏者，你喜欢吗？
t_en: That's how the story ends. Tell me, visitor in this dream, did you enjoy the show?

t_ch: 这不是正确的结局。
t_en: It's not the right ending.

t_ch: 毕竟，那静谧的池底，是由无数骸骨铺就……
t_en: After all, beneath that still surface lie the bones of countless dead...

t_ch: 幻想时间该结束了。
t_en: The fantasy ends here.

t_ch: 的确，那不过是酒杯里闪烁的泡影……
t_en: Yes... just fake bubbles glinting on the surface of poured wine...

t_ch: 我不知道…
t_en: I don't know...

t_ch: 不确定自己该游向何方吗？没关系……
t_en: Not sure which way to swim? It's okay...

t_ch: 我这场醉梦，也该清醒了。
t_en: It's time for me to wake up from this drunken dream.

t_ch: 人们曾为我登峰欢呼…如今为陨落欢呼……
t_en: People once cheered for my ascension... and now they cheer for my fall...

t_ch: 银河…我无法踏足的疆场啊……
t_en: The cosmos... the battlefield that I cannot reach...

t_ch: 在王的征程抵达尽头之前，她的生命与野心，就已被深海埋葬。
t_en: Before the sovereign's conquest reached its end, her life and ambition had already been swallowed by the deep sea.

t_ch: 这便是真正的结局…她的宏图被剑锋撕裂，华贵的衣袍被金血沾满……
t_en: This... is the true ending. Her grand designs torn apart by the blade, her regal robes soaked in golden blood...

t_ch: 而杀死她的人……
t_en: And the one who struck her down...

t_ch: 杀死她的人……
t_en: The one who struck her down...

t_ch: …就是她最忠诚的剑旗。
t_en: ...was her most loyal Gladius.

t_ch: 你…杀死了她？
t_en: You... killed her?

t_ch: 为什么…
t_en: Why...

t_ch: 理由…无需赘述，这方寸池中的鱼儿，本就无法抗拒汹涌的命运。
t_en: I... don't need to explain myself. A fish in a pond has no hope against the surge of fate.

t_ch: 我于岸上徘徊，终于觅见一簇火焰，又将它亲手掐灭……
t_en: I wandered the shore, found a flicker of flame... only to snuff it out with my own hand.

t_ch: 我不明白，如果海洋的欢宴、凯撒的愿景、翁法罗斯的存在都是虚妄…那我们的征程还有何意义？
t_en: I don't understand. If the ocean's feast, the Imperator's dream, and even Amphoreus's existence are all illusions... then what's the point of our journey?

t_ch: 待到「救世主」归来，就让这场荒唐的宴会结束吧。
t_en: When the "Deliverer" returns, I will let this absurd celebration come to an end.

t_ch: 但是，灰鱼儿，我还是忍不住会想……
t_en: But, gray fry, I can't help but wonder...

t_ch: 我多么希望，这场逐火的盛宴…永不散场。
t_en: How I dearly wish this feast of the Flame-Chase... would never end.

t_ch: 看来，她也察觉到了你的造访，幻境的根基已经开始动摇……
t_en: It seems she's sensed your presence. The fantasia's foundation is starting to crack...

t_ch: 让我们回到序幕，那段有关洞穴寓言的问题吧：「洞穴里的囚徒是否能够识别投影和回声，而非将其错认为真正的世界？」
t_en: Let's return to the prologue. Remember the allegory of the cave? "Can the prisoners in the cave learn to see the shadows and echoes for what they are, and stop mistaking them for reality?"

t_ch: 如你所见，当她卸下枷锁，终于得以环顾四周，迈开双腿，只有剧烈的痛苦袭来……
t_en: As you've seen, when she cast off her chains, finally turned to look around, and moved her legs, her reward was nothing but searing pain...

t_ch: 她会被光芒刺眼，因为那身后的火光从来没有直接射入眼眸；她的双腿将无比沉重，因为她从未学过迈步向前。
t_en: The light will blind her, for the fire behind her had never once actually touched her eyes. Her legs will buckle beneath her, for she had never learned to walk forward.

t_ch: 然后，她陷入了无尽的迷茫和恐惧，并坚信：投影和回声才是真正的世界。
t_en: And so she fell into infinite confusion and fear... and came to firmly believe that the shadows and echoes were the real world.

t_ch: 而银河中的我们，是否真的比她清醒？现在，无名的人、无命的人，请试想……
t_en: But we in the cosmos... Are we truly any wiser than she was? Now, nameless one, fateless one, ask yourself this:

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你所行走的命途，你所信仰的星神——你所亲手「开拓」的一切——是否也只是他者投下的阴影？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Paths you tread, the Aeons you worship... everything you've "Trailblazed" with your own hands... could it all be someone else's projected shadow?</color>

t_ch: 就让我们将这个疑问留到幕后罢。当你将所有的真相尽收眼底，抵达半神们为我设下的监牢，我自会与你当面探讨……
t_en: Let's leave that question till after the curtain falls. Once you've unearthed every last truth and reached the prison built for me by the demigods, I'll speak with you face to face...

t_ch: 我作为「神礼观众」，走过由卡厄斯兰那背负的三千万世——
t_en: I, the Theoros, have walked the thirty million histories borne by Khaslana...

t_ch: 千年时光在我的尺度之下，不过细沙中的一粒分子。而翁法罗斯之于银河，又不过是长滩上的一粒细沙。
t_en: A thousand years is a mere atom in a grain of sand to me. Amphoreus, compared to the cosmos, is but that grain upon a whole beach.

t_ch: 鄙人立誓要为「智识」带去终结，又怎会被一粒分子磨尽心智？
t_en: I swore to bring an end to the Erudition. Would I really let a single grain grind down my mind?

t_ch: 现在，请用「岁月」的力量打开那扇通往海底的门。去寻找那位被忠诚折磨的典狱长吧。找到她，步入世界的涡心，然后为你我的一切恩怨作结。
t_en: Now, please use the power of Time to open the gate to the ocean's depths. Go find the prison warden tormented by loyalty. Find her. Step into the world's vortex. And once there... end everything between us.

t_ch: 那宫殿映照着「海洋」半神的心境：酣醉、滞缓。在那里，你也将看到救世史诗的真实开篇……
t_en: That palace reflects the heart of the demigod of Ocean: intoxicated, stagnant. There, you'll witness the true beginning of the saga of deliverance...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那段被洋流洗刷、掩盖的丑恶历史——凯撒以征服之名，行血祭之实，用五百人金血铸成的登神长阶。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>An ugly history long buried by tides and shame. A staircase of apotheosis that the Imperator forged with the golden blood of five hundred human sacrifices under the pretence of conquest.</color>

t_ch: 看！火光投影出了她追忆中的面容，也是这场剧目的演员。
t_en: Look! The fire projects the face from her memories: an actress upon the stage of this play.

t_ch: 为了不让黑潮威胁海洋，女王奉献了全部心血。
t_en: To keep the black tide from threatening the ocean, the queen gave her all, body and soul.

t_ch: 从女王杯中诞生的她，领受了最深的祝福，继承了无上神力……
t_en: Born of the queen's Chalice, she bore the deepest blessings and inherited supreme divine power...

t_ch: 女王的行宫就在前面。她曾经优美的身姿，也被污浊浸没……
t_en: The queen's palace lies just ahead. Even her once-graceful form is now tainted and drowned in dirty mire...

t_ch: 沉溺于过往，只会堵塞前路——何不用「岁月」架起未来的桥梁？
t_en: Clinging to the past only blocks the road forward. Why not let Time build a bridge to the future?

t_ch: （吊灯还是维持不住…周围的时象仪，也许能派上用场？）
t_en: (The chandelier's still giving way... maybe the Chrono Vessel nearby can help?)

t_ch: 您的智慧，远超「理性」模型的边界。
t_en: Your wisdom far surpasses even the bounds of Reason's model.

t_ch: （过不去…看来得借助旁边的「奇迹宝珠」了。）
t_en: (Can't get through... looks like I'll need the Miracle Orb nearby.)

t_ch: 结局早已写就，即使阁下也无可更改…就像这盏可怜的灯。
t_en: The ending was written long ago. Even you cannot rewrite it... just like this poor chandelier.

t_ch: 海列屈拉！我的尾被恶鬼啃啮，再也无法游向远方……
t_en: Helektra! The fiends have gnawed my tail! I can no longer swim to the far seas...

t_ch: 海列屈拉！我的鳍被黑泥浸泡，再也无法随你起舞……
t_en: Helektra! The black sludge has soaked my fins! I can't dance with you anymore...

t_ch: （要想碰到灵水盆，得用上时象仪的力量……）
t_en: (To reach the spirit basin, I'll need to call upon the power of the Chrono Vessel...)

t_ch: 她所说的宴会…究竟在哪里？
t_en: The feast she spoke of... where is it?

t_ch: 伶仃的锋刃，我会赐予你所求的一切。
t_en: Lonely blade... I shall grant you everything you seek.

t_ch: 听说了吗，凯撒即将开启新的征程……
t_en: Have you heard that the Imperator's about to begin a new campaign...

t_ch: 她的伟业，将不再限于翁法罗斯之间……
t_en: Her glory will no longer be bound by the borders of Amphoreus...

t_ch: （幻觉的出口，究竟在哪里……）
t_en: (Where's the way out of this illusion...)

t_ch: 请快来这边，让我们一同欢庆！
t_en: Come quick. Let's celebrate together!

t_ch: 我备好了佳酿，快来一起品尝吧！
t_en: I've saved the finest brew! Come, taste it with me!

t_ch: 快看，王也来到席中了！
t_en: Look! The monarch herself has taken her seat!

t_ch: 快听，群臣在为她献礼！
t_en: Hear that? The court sings her praises!

t_ch: 快来，一同歌颂她的功绩！
t_en: Come! Join us and praise her glory!

t_ch: 凯撒已死！
t_en: The Imperator is dead!

t_ch: 凯撒已死！
t_en: The Imperator is dead!

t_ch: 凯撒已死！
t_en: The Imperator is dead!

t_ch: 我会在世界的心脏等待你，但若要抵达此处……
t_en: I'll wait for you at the heart of the world. But to reach the place...

t_ch: 你必须先找到那沉醉的典狱长。
t_en: You must find the prison warden lost in her stupor.

t_ch: （这道门后，就是通向创世涡心的路……）
t_en: (Beyond this door lies the path to the Vortex of Genesis...)

t_ch: 风堇…「天空」的半神创造的桥梁，助你横跨了空间的距离——而他们对你的信任，也横跨了时间的距离。
t_en: Hyacine... The bridge forged by the Demigod of the Sky helped you cross the chasms of space — and their faith in you spanned the vastness of time itself.

t_ch: 你、你们离阿波罗尼远些……
t_en: S—Stay away from Apollonius...

t_ch: 装满蜜酿的酒杯…如此香醇……
t_en: This cup of honey brew... what a sweet aroma...

t_ch: 快逃吧…维吉妮娅……
t_en: Run... Verginia...

t_ch: 曳石爵…不能在这里放弃！
t_en: Dux Helkolithist... we can't give up here!

t_ch: 爱浸没在死中…多么可口……
t_en: Love steeped in death... how delicious...

t_ch: 阿波罗尼…你看…我把敌人赶跑了……
t_en: Apollonius... look... I chased the enemy away...

t_ch: 但是…我可能…也没法前进了……
t_en: But... I think... I can't go any further...

t_ch: 对不起…维吉妮娅，让你也……
t_en: I'm sorry... Verginia... for letting you...

t_ch: 没关系…能死在你身边，我很幸福……
t_en: It's okay... I'm glad... to die by your side...

t_ch: 啊，这充满讽刺的宿命……
t_en: Ah, such an ironic twist of fate...

t_ch: 哪怕世界的根基早已动摇，无情的凯撒依旧做出了同过去三千万世相同的决定——
t_en: Even as the foundation of the world crumbles, the heartless Imperator still made the same decision she did in the past thirty million cycles...

t_ch: 第一次逐火之旅，逐火的军团攻入斯缇科西亚。数以万计的海妖自冥河中浮现，如巨浪般冲向群英……
t_en: During the First Flame-Chase Journey, the Flame-Chase legion stormed Styxia. Tens of thousands of sea sirens surged from the River of Souls, crashing toward the heroes like a tidal wave...

t_ch: 你面前的地狱，就是那场战役的重现。
t_en: The hell before you... is the re-creation of that very battle.

t_ch: 有一封信…一直没能交给你…让我念给你听吧……
t_en: There's a letter... I never got to give you... Let me read it to you...

t_ch: 是我写的…最后一首诗……
t_en: It's my... final poem...

t_ch: 「树影衬着智者的背影，像一颗巨石在背负年轮……」
t_en: "The shadow of a tree frames the sage's back, like a boulder bearing the rings of time..."

t_ch: 「鸟儿的歌是穿林的风声，却绕不过他嶙峋的裂痕……」
t_en: "The bird's song is a whisper of wind through the forest, but it cannot pass the fractures in his form..."

t_ch: 「他的重量…压住了鸟儿的翅膀…和萌动的心……」
t_en: "His weight... presses down on the bird's wings... and the stirring heart within..."

t_ch: 呵呵…我一直想说……
t_en: Heh... I always wanted to tell you...

t_ch: 你念诗的样子…真美。
t_en: You look... beautiful... when you read poetry.

t_ch: 她吟诗的声音愈发微弱，逐渐与呼吸一同消失在唇边，如缓缓平息的风。
t_en: Her voice, reciting poetry, grows ever fainter, fading with each breath until they all vanish completely at her lips, like wind slowly dying away.

t_ch: 维吉妮娅，新世界…再见……
t_en: Verginia... see you... in the new world...

t_ch: 他的身体逐渐变得僵硬，慈爱的面容仍挂在脸上，如一尊和蔼的石像。
t_en: His form grows rigid, but his kind smile remains, as if he were a benevolent statue frozen in time.

t_ch: 他们第一次并肩而眠，再也不会从这场梦中醒来。
t_en: They lay side by side for the first time, never to wake from this dream again.

t_ch: 痛苦的过去，却用歌声蒙上了快乐的面纱。
t_en: A painful past, yet hidden beneath a veil of joyful song.

t_ch: 啊，两簇被抛弃的数据，似乎在等待谁的归来。
t_en: Ah, two discarded data clusters. Waiting for someone's return, it seems.

t_ch: 重现历史吧，然后…穿过神殿的海水，来到我的身边。
t_en: Relive the history, then... pass through the temple's waters and come to my side.

t_ch: 多么凄惨的死相。
t_en: What a wretched way to die.

t_ch: 被酣歌的鱼群蚕食殆尽的逐火军，他们如此后知后觉……
t_en: The Flame-Chase Army, devoured by warbling fish, never saw it coming...

t_ch: 看呐，残忍的凯撒和她的骑士统领、可怜的典狱官——多么投契的一对演算对象！她们手上都浸满了鲜血…金色的鲜血。
t_en: Look, the cruel Imperator, and her knight commander the pitiful warden... What a perfectly matched duo of test subjects! Their hands drip with blood... golden blood.

t_ch: 升起桥梁，渡过命运的河流吧，这段囚徒之路还远未到终点。
t_en: Raise the bridge and cross the river of fate. This path of the prisoner is far from over.

t_ch: 凯撒…凯撒…你看到了我的英姿吗，凯撒……
t_en: Imperator... Imperator... did you see my gallant deeds, Imperator...?

t_ch: 蠢货…到了这个时候还不明白吗？
t_en: You fool... How could you still not get it even now?

t_ch: 凭她的计谋，怎么可能会让我们陷入如此境地？她从一开始就知晓这场战役的结局……
t_en: With her schemes, do you think she'd ever let us end up like this by accident? She knew how this battle would end from the start...

t_ch: 暴君…我一定要亲手杀了她……
t_en: That tyrant... I swear I'll kill her with my own hands...

t_ch: 不…她不会让我们白白送死，她不会背叛人们的梦想…不会背叛翁法罗斯。
t_en: No... she wouldn't send us to die for nothing. She would never betray our dreams... or Amphoreus.

t_ch: 凯撒，我知道…我是个愚人…所以我永远相信您的旨意……
t_en: Imperator... I know I'm a fool... so I'll believe in your commands... to the very end.

t_ch: 请带着我的性命…完成步入群星的伟业吧……
t_en: Take my life... and finish the conquest of stars...

t_ch: 他破碎的战甲停止了起伏，未瞑目的眼神依旧坚毅，如锐利的断刃。
t_en: His shattered armor ceases its rise and fall. His unclosed eyes remain resolute, sharp as a broken blade.

t_ch: 蠢狗…唔…看来我也没办法复仇了，暴君…没有我…你的征程必将落败……
t_en: You mutt... heh... looks like I won't get my revenge after all. Tyrant... without me, your conquest is doomed...

t_ch: 我会在冥河中等着你蒙羞到来…砍下你顶着皇冠的头颅……
t_en: I'll be waiting for you in the River of Souls... to slice off that crown-wearing head of yours...

t_ch: 记住…我从未向你…和命运屈服……
t_en: Remember this... I never bowed to you... or fate...

t_ch: 她身侧的风暴逐渐停歇，眼角的泪伴血成滩，如金雨积作的浅潭。
t_en: The storm beside her slowly stills, tears and blood pooling at her eyes' corners like shallow ponds of golden rain.

t_ch: 他们第一次和谐共处，停留在永远的和平之中，再无争斗。
t_en: For the first time, they coexist in harmony, dwelling in eternal peace, with no more conflicts.

t_ch: 凯撒，你究竟为何……
t_en: Imperator... why did you...

t_ch: 你来了，剑旗爵。
t_en: You're here, Dux Gladiorum.

t_ch: 你命令我去阻断海路，清理来自后方的威胁——
t_en: You ordered me to seal the sea route and handle threats from the rear...

t_ch: 但你为何不等我归来…为何要让先锋军贸然出击，让他们白白牺牲？！
t_en: So why didn't you wait for me to return!? Why send the vanguard ahead and let them die in vain!?

t_ch: 白白牺牲？你错了——他们的金血不会白流，众爵已为我铺好了成为「律法」神明的道路。
t_en: Die in vain? No, you're wrong. Their golden blood won't be spilled for nothing. The other dukes have paved the road for me to become the god of Law.

t_ch: …「律法」的试炼？你从未向他人提及。它究竟是……
t_en: ...The Trial of Law? You never spoke of this to anyone. What is...?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>意欲承载「律法」之人，必为此世剔除诅咒，以受诅者之血献祭——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The one who wishes to bear Law must purge this world of its curse, and offer the blood of the accursed as sacrifice...</color>

t_ch: 我一直在思索，塔兰顿口中的诅咒之血究竟为何物。后来，我终于找到了答案……
t_en: I pondered long on what Talanton meant by "blood of the accursed." Then, I found the answer...

t_ch: 你与我，所有被神谕感召的黄金裔，皆是受到诅咒之人。正如那狂妄的神礼官所说，金血是「毁灭」的因子，是与世界的命运互斥之物。
t_en: You, I, and every Chrysos Heir summoned by the prophecy are the accursed ones. Just like that arrogant Theoros said, our golden blood is the agent of Destruction, the antithesis of the world's fate.

t_ch: 断锋爵，冬霖爵，曳石爵…他们的前路在那一刻已被决断。在一场光荣的征程中领受牺牲，是我能赐予他们的最后赠礼。
t_en: Dux Fragoris, Dux Brumalis, Dux Helkolithist... their fate was sealed at that moment. Dying on a glorious campaign was the final gift I could give them.

t_ch: 你的语气，就仿佛他们不是因你的阴谋和冷血而死。他们的忠诚在你眼中一文不值？！
t_en: You speak as if they didn't die because of your cold-blooded schemes. Was their loyalty meaningless to you!?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>逐火是不断失却的旅途，生命亦微不足惜。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value.</color>

t_ch: 身为人臣，若在出征时没有此等觉悟——如你所言，浅薄的忠诚不过是敷衍，不值一提。
t_en: If a subject marches to war without that conviction... then yes, as you said, shallow loyalty means nothing.

t_ch: …那我的忠诚呢，刻律德菈？
t_en: ...And what about my loyalty, Cerydra?

t_ch: 你为何要以清理后方为由将我支开？你…心中还剩下哪怕一丝人性么？
t_en: You sent me away under the pretense of guarding the rear. Was there... any shred of humanity left in you?

t_ch: 因为你还有必须承担的职责，仅此而已。除你之外，无人能背负起法吉娜的神权。
t_en: Because you still have a duty no one else can bear. Only you can uphold Phagousa's divine authority.

t_ch: 现在，选择权在你手上。放下束缚你的忠诚，用那对剑刺穿我的心脏…或是继续与我同行，掐断海洋仅剩的一丝呼吸。
t_en: The choice is yours now. Cast off the chains of loyalty and drive those blades through my heart. Or... stand with me, and sever the ocean's last breath.

t_ch: 若你已不再与我共享愿景，不再承认我将为翁法罗斯编织崭新的「律法」，那就尽管夺走我的性命吧……
t_en: If you no longer share my vision or believe in the new Law I seek to weave for Amphoreus, then go on and end me...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的凯撒或许冷酷，或许暴戾，但决不虚伪。当我说出「生命亦是微不足惜的代价」——
t_en: The Imperator of Amphoreus may be ruthless and cruel, but never a hypocrite. When I say "life itself holds little value."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你可确信，凯撒已准备好为迈向星海的野心献祭一切！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Know this: I am ready to sacrifice everything for the ambition to conquer the sea of stars!</color>

t_ch: 现在，你已看到：那残暴的凯撒不惜以五百名英雄的鲜血作为祭品，完成「律法」的试炼…而我那位可怜的典狱官，她的苦难也自此掀开了扉页。
t_en: Now you've seen it: The brutal Imperator was willing to spill the blood of five hundred heroes to complete the Trial of Law. As for my poor warden... her suffering had only just begun.

t_ch: 海瑟音是怎么选的？
t_en: So... what did Hysilens choose?

t_ch: 刻律德菈…还活着么？
t_en: Is Cerydra... still alive?

t_ch: 我并非叙述者。你错过的那段历史，我没有义务，也无兴趣为你填补。
t_en: I'm no storyteller. I have no duty nor interest in filling in the history you've missed.

t_ch: 我只希望你能见证，在黄金裔向我宣战之前，那位凯撒做出了何等灭绝人性的选择。
t_en: I just want you to witness the monstrous choice the Imperator made before the Chrysos Heir turned their blades against me.

t_ch: 为什么让我看这些？
t_en: Why are you showing me this?

t_ch: 呵呵…早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
t_en: Heh... I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...

t_ch: 你以为我会因此动摇？
t_en: You think I'd falter because of this?

t_ch: 呵呵…阁下说笑了。早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
t_en: Heh... you jest. I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...

t_ch: 比你可差远了。
t_en: They're nowhere near as bad as you.

t_ch: 呵呵…阁下还是如此擅长活跃气氛。
t_en: Heh... you've always had a flair for lightening the mood, haven't you?

t_ch: 早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
t_en: I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...

t_ch: 但我也不会任机会溜走。毕竟，如若有万分之一的机会能在你的心壁上凿出裂缝……
t_en: But I won't squander a chance, not even a sliver of one. If there's even a crack in the walls of your conviction...

t_ch: 我的胜利，便会确凿无疑。
t_en: Then my victory is already assured.

t_ch: 既然过往告一段落，就将「岁月」翻回当下——
t_en: Now that the past is settled, let's turn the page and bring Time back to the present...

t_ch: 然后，继续下潜，直至深渊尽头。
t_en: And dive deeper still until we reach the very bottom of the abyss.

t_ch: 你已沉默了许久，剑旗爵…开始后悔自己的选择了？
t_en: You've been silent a long while, Dux Gladiorum... starting to doubt your decision?

t_ch: 不必多言了，法吉娜的涡心就在前方。
t_en: Save your breath. The Vortex of Phagousa lies just ahead.

t_ch: 试炼过后…你我再无瓜葛。
t_en: After the trial... there's nothing left between us.

t_ch: 你不愿游向群星了么，剑旗爵？
t_en: So you'll stop swimming toward the stars, Dux Gladiorum?

t_ch: 我本是一尾海中的鱼儿。天上的群星…与我无干。
t_en: I was always a creature of the sea. The stars in the sky... were never meant for me.

t_ch: 于此地，那位以典狱官自居的囚徒做出了选择……
t_en: It was here that the prisoner, who thinks herself the prison warden, made her choice...

t_ch: 见证，聆听…然后唤醒吧。
t_en: Witness, listen... and awaken.

t_ch: 剑旗爵…过去的百年里，我已数不清你在此地驻足过几回了。
t_en: Dux Gladiorum... I've lost count of how many times you've stood here over the past centuries.

t_ch: 你是个聒噪的囚徒，吕枯耳戈斯。
t_en: You talk too much for a prisoner, Lycurgus.

t_ch: 两位篡改了「律法」的天才，还有这一世牺牲的所有黄金裔，他们——你们——合力削弱了我的力量，但无法剥夺我的意志。
t_en: Two geniuses who defied "Law" and all the Chrysos Heirs who sacrificed themselves in this cycle worked together to chip away my strength, but they — you — can never affect my will.

t_ch: 只要意志依旧完整，我便是自由的。
t_en: And as long as my will remains intact, I am free.

t_ch: 呵…别得意得太早，我仍有办法束缚你的神魂。
t_en: Heh... don't get ahead of yourself. I still have ways to chain your divine soul.

t_ch: 我很期待。不过，你的使命也差不多该结束了吧——
t_en: Please. Do surprise me. But I'd say, your mission is nearly done here, isn't it?

t_ch: 于此地，你自法吉娜的身躯中剜出了「海洋」的火种；也是在这里，你与那位凯撒双双登神，成为翁法罗斯的支柱。那之后……
t_en: It was here you gorged out the Coreflame of Ocean from Phagousa's body. It was here you and that Imperator both completed apotheosis, becoming pillars of Amphoreus. And after that...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你将剑刃刺入了她的心脏，成为了弑君的臣子，弑神的半神——至少，历史是如此描绘那场惨剧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You drove your blade into her heart, a loyal subject turned regicide, a demigod committing deicide, or so the history books paint that tragedy.</color>

t_ch: 但倘若真相如此，千年时光已逝，你却仍在守候那位凯撒的墓碑，履行对她的忠诚…为什么？
t_en: But if that's the truth, then why, after a thousand years, are you still here, guarding the Imperator's grave? Still bound by loyalty?

t_ch: 如此想来…或许，被囚禁于此的不止我一人。
t_en: Come to think of it... perhaps I'm not the only one imprisoned here.

t_ch: 你的从容的确会掀起我胸间的怒涛…仿佛在此接受惩罚的并非是你，而是失去了一切的我们。
t_en: Your calm does stir the rage in me... As if the one paying the price here isn't you, but us, the ones who lost everything.

t_ch: 呵呵…因为我已为自己的愿景等待了三千万世，无数个千年。
t_en: Hehe... That's only because I've waited thirty million lifetimes for my vision to be realized. Countless millennia.

t_ch: 孤独从未向我露出过它致命的一面。事实上，对洞穴的囚徒而言，它更像一位能帮助我专注思考的老朋友。
t_en: Loneliness never once showed me its fatal side. In fact, for a prisoner of the cave, it's more like an old friend. One that helps me think.

t_ch: 但对你却不同，剑旗爵。孤独自寂静的深海中伸出魔爪，它正在蚕食着你，逐渐剥离你的心智——你会退化成那些失迷海妖的模样吗？多么令人惋惜……
t_en: But you're different, Dux Gladiorum. Loneliness has crept from the silent depths, sinking its claws into your mind. Bit by bit, it's peeling you apart... Will you regress into one of those lost, mad sirens? Oh, what a shame that would be...

t_ch: 你是对的，吕枯耳戈斯。忠诚，诅咒，同胞们的陨落，漫无尽头的等待…对于一条看不见光明的鱼来说，这些枷锁太过沉重了。
t_en: You're right, Lycurgus. Loyalty, curse, the fall of my kin, and this endless waiting... these shackles are too heavy for a fish that cannot perceive any light.

t_ch: 我游不出牵引着我陷落的漩涡，也没有多么坚定的信念，能如众人所愿，强迫自己等待那个人的归来。
t_en: I can't break free of the whirlpool that's pulling me under. Nor do I have the unwavering resolve to force myself to wait for that person's return, as everyone hoped for.

t_ch: 啊…天外的救世主，我的行刑官。{M#他}{F#她}还要过多久才会来到此地？
t_en: Ah... Deliverer from beyond the sky. My executioner. How much longer until {F#s}he arrives here?

t_ch: 或者，{M#他}{F#她}还会回归么？
t_en: Or... will {F#s}he ever return?

t_ch: 我不知道。恐怕也没人能为我解答。
t_en: I don't know. And I doubt anyone does.

t_ch: 那么，你想怎么做？
t_en: Then, what will you do?

t_ch: 刻律德菈……
t_en: Cerydra...

t_ch: 这将是我最后一次履行你的律令了。
t_en: This will be the last time I carry out your decree.

t_ch: 自你将我收入麾下，赐我剑旗爵的名号，我的乐声便只为他人响起。无数次，为了你的阳谋和心计，我以海妖的哼鸣将众人引入幻境……
t_en: Ever since you took me under your banner and made me the Dux Gladiorum, my music has belonged to others. Time and time again, I used the siren's song to lure the unwary into illusions for your schemes and strategies...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>现在，就让海妖「海列屈拉」为自己歌唱，让我踏入一场无休无止的幻梦吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Now... let the siren "Helektra" sing for herself. Let me step into an endless dream of my own making.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>海洋啊！我向你献上余生的清醒和自由——以换取与「虚无」抗争的力量，不辜负众英雄的牺牲。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>O great ocean! I offer you the rest of my clarity and my freedom, in exchange for the strength to stand against the "Nihility"... and honor the sacrifices of the fallen heroes.</color>

t_ch: 灰鱼儿，天外的救世主……
t_en: Gray Fry, Deliverer from beyond the sky...

t_ch: 当你穿过岁月的洋流来到此地，你会听到我的独奏——它将引领你前往世界的心脏。
t_en: When you ride the current of time and find your way here, you'll hear my solo. It will guide you to the heart of this world.

t_ch: 那时，我或许还沉浸在自缚的醉梦中。但我会履行这场接力的职责，捍卫封印神礼观众的枷锁。
t_en: By then, I may still be lost in my self-wrought slumber. But I'll uphold my part of this long relay and guard the shackles that seal the Theoros.

t_ch: 还记得么？若要将人从海妖的歌声中唤醒，你需要的东西……
t_en: Do you still remember? To awaken someone from a siren's voice, you'll need...

t_ch: 法吉娜的蜜露…
t_en: Phagousa's Honeydew...

t_ch: 我赠予你的礼物——但愿那时你还留在身边。
t_en: The gift I once gave you... May you still have it when the time comes.

t_ch: 待你归来之时，就请以那蜜酿浇奠这座墓碑吧。
t_en: When you return, please pour that honey brew upon this grave.

t_ch: 它记录了我们所有人的抗争和牺牲。但愿你能看到，这跨越千年的漫长接力，翁法罗斯为你的归来谱写的前奏。
t_en: It holds the story of all of our struggles and sacrifices. May you see it one day, the prelude Amphoreus wrote for your return, carried forward through a thousand-year relay.

t_ch: 当你的哀悼结束时，我大概也会从醉梦中苏醒了吧？就请你顺着余音的轨迹，找到我的所在——
t_en: When your mourning ends, I'll likely wake from my dream as well. Then, follow the trail of echoes and find me.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>然后，我们再一同去为那「智识」的罪人行刑吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And together, we'll bring judgment upon the sinner who defiled the Erudition.</color>

t_ch: 终于…<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次轮回又<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年后，翁法罗斯的终幕将要落下了。
t_en: At long last... <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> cycles and <unbreak>4,931</unbreak> years later, Amphoreus' final curtain is ready to fall.

t_ch: 洞穴中的影子献出一切，却只是在戏仿洞外的「生命」，令人惋惜的徒劳。
t_en: The shadows within the cave gave everything, yet all they did was mimic "life" outside its walls. A futile effort steeped in sorrow.

t_ch: 住口吧，他们不是影子……
t_en: Enough! They were no shadows...

t_ch: 他们所做的一切，已经打破了昏暗的洞穴，寻得了「开拓」的火种……
t_en: Everything they did shattered the darkness of this cave and unearthed the Coreflame of {M#the }Trailblaze...

t_ch: 现在，我会用这颗火种，点燃翁法罗斯的黎明！
t_en: And now, with that Coreflame, I'll light the dawn of Amphoreus!

t_ch: …呵呵，你找到的答案，仍是命途的意志吗？
t_en: ...Heh. Do you still choose the will of the Paths as your answer in the end?

t_ch: 我不认可这个答案，但是我认可你对他们的赞许，容我收回方才的失言。
t_en: I do not agree with that answer, but I respect your tribute to them. Allow me to take back my earlier words.

t_ch: 为表歉意，以见证此世全部命运的神礼观众之名：让我加入您的悼念，送别长眠于此的英雄们……
t_en: As an apology, and in the name of Theoros who saw all destinies in this world, let me join you in mourning. Let us bid farewell to the heroes who sleep here...

t_ch: 然后，再让我们当面角逐，决定这轮新日该承载谁的火光。
t_en: And then, let us face each other and decide whose flame will rise with this new dawn.

t_ch: 你将杯中的蜜酿倾倒在碑前，琥珀液体流入碑文的裂隙，仿佛英雄在畅饮泼洒的敬意。
t_en: You pour the honey brew onto the gravestone, amber liquid seeping into the crevices of the inscriptions, as if the heroes are drinking deep of the spilled tribute.

t_ch: 敬维吉妮娅，阿波罗尼，塞涅卡，拉比努斯，刻律德菈……
t_en: To Verginia, Apollonius, Seneca, Labienus, and Cerydra...

t_ch: 以一场残酷的献祭，他们点亮此世「律法」的星辰，推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前。
t_en: Through a brutal sacrifice, they lit the stars of Law in this world, propelling Amphoreus' fate forward.

t_ch: 于海市蜃楼的泡影中，他们将踏足星间的空想托付予后世的英雄。
t_en: In the shimmering mirage of illusion, they entrusted their dreams to ride among the stars to the hero yet to come.

t_ch: 你再次倾倒圣杯，石碑沐浴蜜酿，如半神沐浴金血，承载命运的洗练。
t_en: You tip the chalice once more, the honey brew bathing the stone like golden blood upon a demigod, forging destiny through its purifying flow.

t_ch: 敬阿格莱雅，缇里西庇俄丝，迈德漠斯，遐蝶，阿那克萨戈拉斯，赛法利娅，雅辛忒丝……
t_en: To Aglaea, Tribios, Mydeimos, Castorice, Anaxagoras, Cifera, Hyacinthia...

t_ch: 以一场持续千年的接力，面对远超自身的敌手，他们在徒劳的抗争中赢得惨胜。
t_en: In a relay spanning a thousand years, they stood against enemies far beyond their strength, and won a bitter victory through what seemed like futile resistance.

t_ch: 而在那同样以徒劳为题的三千万世回归中，他们亦忠实履行了自己对实验的义务，始终如一。
t_en: And in that same thirty million cycles, also marked by futility, they remained steadfast in fulfilling their duty to the experiment... unchanging, unwavering.

t_ch: 逝者的祭奠以此作结。最后，请容我再次举杯，敬我那彷徨的典狱官，为忠诚所困的囚人——
t_en: Let this be the end of mourning the fallen. At last, allow me one final toast to the lost prison warden, a prisoner bound by loyalty.

t_ch: 这歌声…难道是……
t_en: That voice... could it be...

t_ch: 在法吉娜蜜露的浇灌下，她将于千年的醉梦中醒来，演唱自己使命的最后乐章。
t_en: Bathed in the Honeydew of Phagousa, she will awaken from her thousand-year dream and sing the final song of her mission.

t_ch: 海瑟音……
t_en: Hysilens...

t_ch: 这座旧世的墓碑是海妖幻境的锚点，海列屈拉用于自缚的符号。同时，它也正是好戏开幕时我曾声明的，翁法罗斯的缩影……
t_en: This tombstone of the old world serves as the anchor of the siren's illusion, a sigil Helektra used to bind herself. At the same time, it is the very thing I once proclaimed at the start of the show: a microcosm of Amphoreus itself...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>一群自缚于洞穴中的囚徒自比英雄，以苦难为桂冠，与影子和回声同台共演的史诗。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A group of prisoners bound themselves in a cave, crowning their suffering with heroism, an epic staged with shadows and echoes.</color>

t_ch: 现在，亲手摧毁它，粉碎这场幻梦吧。就此，神礼观众将暂时离场，而当我们再次相遇——
t_en: Now, destroy it. End the illusion. The Theoros will take his leave for now. And when next we meet...

t_ch: 那便是决定翁法罗斯，乃至银河命运的时分。
t_en: That shall be the moment that decides the fate of Amphoreus and the entire cosmos.

t_ch: 现在，从虚假的宴会离席吧——
t_en: Now, step away from this false banquet...

t_ch: 而后，登上那血腥的舞台。
t_en: And then, onto that bloody stage.

t_ch: 错乱的时空，映照出她的迷惘——
t_en: The twisted time and space reflect her confusion...

t_ch: 看，是救世主！
t_en: Look, it's the Deliverer!

t_ch: 救、救世主？{M#他}{F#她}竟然回来了……
t_en: Th—The Deliverer? {M#He's}{F#She's} back...

t_ch: ——也遮蔽了凯撒的罪行。
t_en: ...And so, the Imperator's crimes were veiled.

t_ch: 可惜，眼前不过是历史的残响。
t_en: Sadly, all you see is a remnant of history.

t_ch: 你的介入，也同样是徒劳的回音。
t_en: And your interference is just another equally futile echo.

t_ch: 这不是救世主吗？你终于来了！
t_en: Isn't that the Deliverer? You finally made it!

t_ch: 玩失踪的救世主，你还有脸回来啊！
t_en: Playing dead, huh? Deliverer, you've got some nerve coming back!

t_ch: 王，与王身边的宝剑。
t_en: A sovereign and the sword at her side.

t_ch: 放眼寰宇诸界，对照组数不胜数，而他们的结局…也多是悲剧。
t_en: There are countless counterparts across the cosmos. Most of their stories end in... tragedy.

t_ch: （前路在水下吗？要用欧洛尼斯宝珠，将过去的「时象仪」带来……）
t_en: (Is the path ahead underwater? I need the Oronyx Orb to bring back the Chrono Vessel from the past...)

t_ch: 打破岁月的器皿，让这池死水倒转吧——
t_en: Shatter the vessel of time, and let this stagnant pool start to flow again...

t_ch: 正如翁法罗斯支离破碎的命运。
t_en: Just like the broken fate of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 这道暗门，通往涡心……
t_en: This hidden gate leads to the Vortex...

t_ch: 快步迈向我们的重逢吧…救世主。
t_en: Hurry now... the time of our reunion draws near, Deliverer.

t_ch: 乘浪的船队被浪卷入深水，逐火的若虫被火烧作飞灰，多么可悲。
t_en: The fleet that rode the waves was dragged down into the deep... the flame-chasing nymphs were reduced to ash... what a tragedy.

t_ch: 而你，救世主——也将见证这金色的死亡。
t_en: And you, Deliverer, shall bear witness to this golden death.

t_ch: 这场残酷的征程……
t_en: Now this cruel journey...

t_ch: 终于，要落下帷幕了。
t_en: Will reach its end at long last.

t_ch: 看，一座墓碑……
t_en: Look, a gravestone...

t_ch: 不知它为谁人而立？
t_en: But whose name does it bear?

t_ch: 典狱官的沉醉即将结束，而囚徒也将得到自由……
t_en: The prison warden's dream is nearly over. And the prisoner will soon be freed...

t_ch: 往最后的刑场——将我处决，或被我处决。
t_en: To the final execution ground, where I shall be executed, or be the executioner.

t_ch: 最后的半神…我来了。
t_en: The last demigod... I'm here.

t_ch: 前进吧，为了世人的心愿！
t_en: Go forth. For the hopes of humankind!

t_ch: 前进吧，为了救世的责任！
t_en: Go forth. For the duty of deliverance!

t_ch: 前进吧，为了逐火的信念！
t_en: Go forth. For the belief in Flame-Chase!

t_ch: 前进吧，为了荣耀的金血！
t_en: Go forth. For the golden blood's glory!

t_ch: 前进吧——
t_en: Go forth...

t_ch: 祭拜海洋的宫殿，与涡心相连的圣所，也曾是第一次逐火的战场……
t_en: The palace that worshiped the ocean, the sanctuary connected to the Vortex, was also once the battlefield of the first Flame Chase...

t_ch: 她的酣歌令此处岁月驻足，禁锢我的身躯，躲避灵魂的磨损——只为等候你的归来。
t_en: Her exuberant song halted the passage of time in this place, imprisoning my body and shielding her soul from deterioration, all just to await your return.

t_ch: 我与这片天地都将停滞于此…直至与你重逢。
t_en: This world and I shall halt here... until we meet again.

t_ch: 时间流速变慢了…
t_en: The flow of time has slowed down...

t_ch: 什么时候更新的慢放功能？
t_en: When was the slo-mo feature added?

t_ch: 致那些为了逐火而牺牲的黄金裔们——他们的命运不为神谕所示，却不因其微渺而自惭自卑，决然地将金血挥洒于逐火的道路。
t_en: To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives chasing flame — Their fates were not foretold by prophecy, yet they bore no shame in their insignificance. With unwavering resolve, they shed golden blood along the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 阅读碑文。
t_en: Read the inscription.

t_ch: 「断锋爵」拉比努斯，生于光历<unbreak>3743</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
t_en: "Dux Fragoris" Labienus. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3743</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，生于光历<unbreak>3749</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
t_en: "Dux Brumalis" Seneca. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3749</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，生于光历<unbreak>3853</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
t_en: "Dux Carminum" Verginia. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3853</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，生于光历<unbreak>3704</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
t_en: "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3704</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

t_ch: 在长长的墓志铭末尾——
t_en: At the end of the long epitaph...

t_ch: 「律法之半神」，「凯撒」刻律德菈…逝于光历3960年。
t_en: Cerydra the Imperator, the Demigod of Law... Deceased Light Calendar 3960.

t_ch: 浇奠第一次逐火之旅的英雄们。
t_en: Libate for the heroes of the first Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 致那些为了新世界而献身的黄金裔们——他们的命运谨如神谕所示，也许无论时空如何轮转，都会恰逢世界所需之时降世，只为行其职责、全其夙愿。
t_en: To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives for a new world — Their fates, as foretold by prophecy, are to be born whenever the world needs them, irrespective of how time and space may shift, all to fulfill their duty and answer their calling.

t_ch: 阅读碑文。
t_en: Read the inscription.

t_ch: 「大地之半神」荒笛，生于光历前约<unbreak>2000</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年。
t_en: Terravox, the Demigod of Earth. Born approx. <unbreak>2000</unbreak> years before the Light Calendar system. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3961</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「浪漫之半神」阿格莱雅，生于光历<unbreak>3860</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4210</unbreak>年。
t_en: Aglaea, the Demigod of Romance. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3860</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4210</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「死亡之半神」遐蝶，生于光历？？？年，逝于光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年。
t_en: Castorice, the Demigod of Death. Born Light Calendar ???. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历<unbreak>4071</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年。
t_en: Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4071</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4284</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「门径之半神」缇里西庇俄丝，生于光历<unbreak>3720</unbreak>年，最后一位逝于光历<unbreak>4295</unbreak>年。
t_en: Tribios, the Demigod of Passage. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3720</unbreak>. The last piece of her deceased in Light Calendar <unbreak>4295</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「诡计之半神」赛法利娅，生于光历<unbreak>3942</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
t_en: Cifera, the Demigod of Trickery. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3942</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「理性之半神」阿那克萨戈拉斯，生于光历<unbreak>4065</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
t_en: Anaxagoras, the Demigod of Reason. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4065</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.

t_ch: 「天空之半神」雅辛忒丝，生于光历<unbreak>4297</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年。
t_en: Hyacinthia, the Demigod of Sky. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4297</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>.

t_ch: 在墓志铭的末尾，一行尚未刻完的铭文——
t_en: At the end of the epitaph, a line left unfinished...

t_ch: 「海洋之半神」海列屈拉，生于光历3860年，逝于光历    年。
t_en: Helektra, "Demigod of Ocean." Born Light Calendar 3860. Deceased Light Calendar .

t_ch: 浇奠第二次逐火之旅的英雄们。
t_en: Libate for the heroes of the second Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 熟悉的英雄们洋溢着微笑，庆祝你的归来…然而，你知晓这一切仍是记忆中的虚妄。
t_en: Familiar heroes beam with joy, celebrating your return... yet you know this, too, remains a hollow memory.

t_ch: 阿波罗尼…你看…
t_en: Apollonius... look...

t_ch: 凯撒…凯撒…
t_en: Imperator... Imperator...

t_ch: 在「海洋」的约束下，「岁月」也沉入迷醉的乱流，令你的祷言力量被洋流减缓……
t_en: Under the constraints of the "Ocean," "Time" sinks into intoxicating turbulence, causing your prayer's power to be slowed by the currents...

t_ch: 小灰鱼儿，请允许我对你道一声谢。
t_en: Little Gray Fry... Please, accept my thanks.

t_ch: 世界步入毁灭后，唯剩我一人用歌声维系这场孤独的宴会。千百年来，我向那{RUBY_B#翁法罗斯的天幕}无光之海{RUBY_E#}祈愿，期待它能投来回音，可虚空从未作答……
t_en: I was the only one left after the world was destroyed, and I maintained this lonesome feast with my songs. I have prayed to that {RUBY_B#Amphoreus's sky}lightless sea{RUBY_E#} for centuries, hoping it would reply to me, yet the emptiness never answered...

t_ch: 万幸，你如约而至。人们的等待终究没有被辜负。
t_en: Thankfully, you arrived as promised, and everyone's wait was not in vain.

t_ch: 漫长的守候很煎熬吧？
t_en: Your long wait must have felt like torture.

t_ch: 能在徒劳的海渊中捕捉到一丝微光，已是最大的慰藉。比起那些被遗忘的人，我无权诉说煎熬。
t_en: To see a single trace of light in the abyss of futility was already my greatest consolation. When compared to those who have been forgotten... I have no right to complain about my torment.

t_ch: 你还保持着理智吗？
t_en: Are you still holding it together?

t_ch: 我的理智虽然遭受折磨，但我的剑刃依旧锋利，这双手依旧敏捷，只要能捍卫最后的战场，清醒与否又何妨？
t_en: Even though madness claws at my mind, my sword stays sharp, my hands agile. If I can uphold this last battlefield, clarity is but an afterthought.

t_ch: 你的歌声很美。
t_en: Your song is beautiful.

t_ch: 谢谢，我最后一位听众…呵，这大概也是我能听见的最后一句嘉奖了。
t_en: Thank you, final audience of mine... Heh. This is probably the last praise I'll ever hear in my life.

t_ch: 接下来，你我就要走向世界的终点。
t_en: Now... You and I will walk towards the end of this world.

t_ch: 这一刻，英雄们已经等待了太久。就让我们以剑明志吧。
t_en: The heroes have waited for this moment for far too long. Let us use our blades to testify our resolve.

t_ch: 海洋的囚徒、身负三千万世罪孽的神礼观众、「智识」的奴仆——
t_en: O prisoner of the seas, Theoros carrying thirty million cycles' of sin, slave of the Erudition...

t_ch: 现身吧：救世主已经归来，行刑的时刻到了。
t_en: Show yourself! The Deliverer has returned, and the time of your execution draws near.

t_ch: 我看见：一位错把谬误当作真理的觉醒者返回了洞穴，试图将同伴带入{M#他}{F#她}曾沐浴过的阳光……
t_en: I see an awakened human who has mistakenly taken fallacies as truths, and has returned to the cave to try to bring {M#his}{F#her} friends into the sunlight {F#s}he once bathed in...
